top_findings.summary: The skill description states a purpose of "providing automated assistance for mermaid class diagram generator tasks" and "generating production-ready code", but requests the "Bash" and "Grep" permissions in addition to Read/Write/Edit. While Read/Write/Edit permissions might be justifiable for creating diagram files, the unrestricted Bash access allows arbitrary command execution on the host system, which is clearly excessive and unrelated to generating diagram code or providing guidance. This represents a significant privilege escalation risk beyond the stated visual content generation purpose.
